data.title: Imperial Brands Completes Share Buyback Milestone
data.description:
Imperial Brands (GB:IMB) has released an update.

Imperial Brands PLC has successfully bought back 120,000 of its ordinary shares for cancellation as part of its £1.1 billion share repurchase program announced last October. These transactions occurred on August 9, 2024, with shares purchased at an average price of GBp 2,129.95 each, through Barclays. Post-cancellation, the company’s remaining shares in issue total 852,242,142.

For further insights into GB:IMB stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bukit Jalil Global Merges with Global IBO, Eyes Nasdaq Listing
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bukit Jalil Global Acquisition 1 Ltd. (BUJA).

Bukit Jalil Global Acquisition 1 Ltd. (BUJA) has entered into an agreement to merge with Global IBO Group Ltd. (GIBO), aiming to revolutionize AI-driven content creation. This business combination will result in GIBO becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of PubCo, with BUJA and GIBO becoming subsidiaries of PubCo. Shareholders will receive new shares in PubCo, which plans to list on Nasdaq. The merger is contingent on shareholder and regulatory approvals, with specific conditions outlined for completion. The combined entity aims to leverage GIBO’s cutting-edge AI technology to empower content creators and provide new distribution channels.

Find detailed analytics on BUJA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Winpak Ltd. Announces Quarterly Dividend Growth Plan
data.description:
Winpak Limited (TSE:WPK) has released an update.

Winpak Ltd. has declared a quarterly dividend of five cents per share, payable on October 11, 2024, to shareholders who are on record by October 1, 2024. The company’s Board of Directors aims to reach a payout ratio of 10% of net earnings to equity holders within the next five years, indicating a strategy for sustained dividend growth.

For further insights into TSE:WPK stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BluSky Carbon to Acquire Carbon Alliance Group
data.description:
BluSky Carbon Inc. (TSE:BSKY) has released an update.

BluSky Carbon Inc., a player in the carbon removal clean technology sector, has signed a binding letter of intent to acquire Carbon Alliance Group Inc., aiming to bolster its sales channels and feedstock pipeline for biochar production. The acquisition will enable BluSky to leverage Carbon Alliance’s industry expertise, relationships, and developments in multiple states. The strategic move anticipates enhancing BluSky’s carbon credit offset valuation through eco-friendly products for soil amendments and water treatment.

For further insights into TSE:BSKY stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Eutelsat Group Plans Ground Infrastructure Sale
data.description:
Eutelsat Communications (FR:ETL) has released an update.

Eutelsat Group is set to restructure its ground segment infrastructure, entering exclusive negotiations with EQT Infrastructure VI fund to form a new company. Eutelsat will retain a 20% stake in the new standalone entity, which aims to become the world’s largest operator-neutral ground station-as-a-service company. The deal, valued at €790m, is expected to enhance Eutelsat’s financial profile and allow it to concentrate on advancing its satellite fleet, with closure anticipated in early 2026.

For further insights into FR:ETL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cenergy Holdings Reschedules Financial Results Announcement
data.description:
Cenergy Holdings SA (DE:9CN) has released an update.

Cenergy Holdings SA has rescheduled the release of its financial results and interim report for the first half of 2024 to August 27, 2024, with a conference call for investors and analysts to follow on August 28, 2024. The company, listed on Euronext Brussels and the Athens Stock Exchange, specializes in energy transportation, renewable energies, and data transmission through its subsidiaries, Corinth Pipeworks and Hellenic Cables.

For further insights into DE:9CN stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Deswell Industries Files Annual Financial Report
data.description:
Deswell (DSWL) has released an update.

Deswell Industries, Inc., a manufacturer of plastic parts and electronic products, has filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2024, with the SEC. The report, which includes audited financial statements, is available on the SEC’s website, and shareholders can request a free paper copy. Deswell specializes in OEM and contract manufacturing, producing a diverse range of products from consumer electronics to IoT devices.

For further insights into DSWL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: De La Rue Announces Upcoming 2024 AGM Details
data.description:
De La Rue (GB:DLAR) has released an update.

De La Rue PLC has announced the dispatch of its Annual General Meeting (AGM) materials to shareholders, including a circular and a proxy voting form for the upcoming meeting on September 25, 2024. The documents are also accessible for public inspection via the National Storage Mechanism and will be available on the company’s website.

data.title: Usha Resources Ramps Up Exploration Efforts
data.description:
Usha Resources (TSE:USHA) has released an update.

Usha Resources has announced the discovery of spodumene at its White Willow project and is gearing up for drilling at its Southern Arm Copper-Gold property. With a healthy balance sheet, the company is well-positioned to pursue its exploration plans, including a maiden drill program at the Southern Arm project located in the resource-rich Abitibi Greenstone Belt.

For further insights into TSE:USHA stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Jet2 PLC Releases Annual Report & Schedules AGM
data.description:
Jet2 PLC (GB:JET2) has released an update.

Jet2 PLC has announced the publication of its Annual Report & Accounts for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2024, along with the Notice of its 2024 Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held in September. Shareholders have been provided access to these documents, which are also available on the company’s website. The AGM is scheduled for 5 September 2024 at Buchanan Communications in London.

For further insights into GB:JET2 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
